Two vendor+item matches were read: 2025-11-28 (relay modules line_eur 12) and 2026-02-28 (relay modules line_eur 6). Both match vendor/item; choose closest to anchor per rule: |2025-11-28 - 2025-10-06|=53 days, |2026-02-28 - 2025-10-06|=145 days. Closest record is 2025-11-28. Answer number is 12.
